dynamic.name: hashserviceAddHost
dynamic.description: Allows the user to add a new host to the system

dynamic.name: hashserviceDeleteHost
dynamic.description: Allows the user to delete a host from the system

dynamic.name: hashserviceUpdateHost
dynamic.description: Allows the user to update host details

dynamic.name: hashserviceAddVersion

dynamic.name: hashserviceDeleteVersion

dynamic.name: hashserviceUpdateVersion
dynamic.description: Allows the user to update version details
